title: F4TE
body:
F4TE - The Vanilla 4x4 Resource Pack

F4te is a simple 4x4 resource pack that keeps everything close to vanilla Minecraft.
Every texture is recreated at 4x4 resolution—staying true to the original look with crisp, low-res pixels. No redesigns, no extras added, just the classic blocky feel but ultra-lightweight and retro.

Perfect for extreme FPS boosts on low-end PCs, potato setups, survival worlds, servers, or if you love that nostalgic pixel charm without the default 16x blur. Great when you want max performance in vanilla Minecraft.

Supports latest versions (1.21+ included, older ones in files). Works fine with OptiFine, Sodium, Iris, etc.

If you're looking for a 4x4 faithful-style pack, minecraft 4x4 texture pack, or the cleanest low resolution option, F4te delivers that timeless look with pixel-perfect polish.
